CustomField.formula:
Case (Cycle__c,
"One-time", Estimated_Start_Date__c , "Monthly",Estimated_Start_Date__c+30, "Quarterly",Estimated_Start_Date__c+90, "Semi-Annual",Estimated_Start_Date__c+180, "Annual",
IF (Month(Estimated_Start_Date__c)=2 && Day(Estimated_Start_Date__c)=29, Date(Year(Estimated_Start_Date__c)+1,2,28), Date(Year(Estimated_Start_Date__c)+1,Month(Estimated_Start_Date__c),Day(Estimated_Start_Date__c)))-1,
null )
/*
One-Time - Created Date Annual - one year from today - 1 day Quarterly - 90 days from Created Date Semi Annual - 180 days from Created Date Monthly - 30 days
*/
CustomField.label: Estimated End Date
